full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Generating the results comparison table and honest gap analysis
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: For Task 2.3, report my arc-cosine kernel results alongside the paper's values (rectangles-image 22-25%, convex 17-19%, MNIST variants). Write 3-5 honest sentences explaining why our numbers differ. Include a formatted results table.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Produced a clear side-by-side comparison table and a 4-sentence analytical explanation covering dataset complexity, dimensionality, sample size, and binary-vs-multiclass task differences.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked all paper error rates against Figures 2-5. Confirmed the rectangles-image SVM-RBF value of 24.04% and DBN-3 value of 22.50% match Table/Figure 2.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Creating confusion matrix and bar chart visualizations
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write Python code to: (1) generate side-by-side confusion matrices for the best arc-cosine kernel vs RBF baseline using seaborn heatmap, saved to partB/results/task_2_plot.png, and (2) a bar chart of error rates across all methods mimicking Figures 2-3 style.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the visualization code with seaborn heatmaps and matplotlib bar charts, including proper formatting (annotations, color schemes, axis labels).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Changed the color scheme from the default to Blues/Oranges for better visual contrast. Added automatic best-kernel selection instead of hardcoding. Added the bar chart as a second visualization (the LLM initially only provided the confusion matrix).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Ran the code, verified both plots render correctly and save to the specified paths. Confirmed confusion matrix values sum to the test set size.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write a reproducibility checklist confirming: random seeds set, dependencies in requirements.txt (CPU only), notebook runs top-to-bottom, no manual steps, hyperparameters clustered.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided the 5-point checklist with specific values cited (RANDOM_SEED=42, package versions, etc.).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified requirements.txt exists and contains correct packages. Confirmed all notebooks include np.random.seed(42) at the top. Tested that task_2_3.ipynb runs independently.
